title: Mirror Report — SERVICE — pgp_orlando
body:
**Mirror Report: TTLG SERVICE Diagnostic**

WHAT WE FOUND: Our diagnostic revealed that TTLG SERVICE has a Sovereign Alignment Score of 16/25, indicating areas for improvement in key dimensions. Specifically, we identified gaps in the onboarding process and communication, with some clients experiencing delays due to incomplete paperwork or lack of communication from the team. While the onboarding process is generally straightforward, these issues can hinder the overall client experience. Furthermore, communication breakdowns can lead to misunderstandings and dissatisfaction.

THE REAL COST: These gaps can have significant consequences, including delayed service start times, frustrated clients, and potential loss of business. Incomplete paperwork and poor communication can lead to wasted time and resources, ultimately affecting the bottom line. By addressing these issues, TTLG SERVICE can reduce the risk of client churn and improve overall efficiency.

THE PATH FORWARD: To address these gaps, we recommend focusing on the highest-leverage indicators. First, streamline the onboarding process by implementing a more efficient paperwork system and ensuring clear communication with clients. Second, enhance communication by establishing regular check-ins and providing timely updates on service progress. Finally, consider implementing a client feedback mechanism to identify and address issues promptly.

WHAT CHANGES IN 30 DAYS: By implementing these changes, TTLG SERVICE can expect to see measurable improvements in the onboarding process and communication within 30 days. Specifically, we project a reduction in onboarding delays and an increase in client satisfaction, with a medium level of confidence in these outcomes.

SOVEREIGN ALIGNMENT SCORE: With a current score of 16/25, TTLG SERVICE has opportunities to improve its alignment with best practices and enhance the client experience. By addressing the identified gaps and implementing targeted changes, TTLG SERVICE can increase its Sovereign Alignment Score, leading to improved efficiency, client satisfaction, and ultimately, business growth.
